market_overview.headline: Full bear structure dominates with SPY, QQQ, and BTC all in Full Bear mode, signaling broad-based risk-off conditions.
market_overview.detail: Only 40% of stocks maintain bullish structure while 34% are in Full Bear mode. Both major indices showing crossover potential but from deeply oversold conditions.

momentum_themes.headline: Electronic Tech Leading Momentum
momentum_themes.detail: Electronic technology dominance with optical/semiconductor names leading. LITE, CIEN, and WDC showing explosive 25%+ spreads as AI infrastructure demand accelerates.

sector_analysis.headline: Energy Minerals vs Tech Services Divide

strongest.note: Perfect bullish alignment with 100% of energy names in Full Bull mode.
Strong infrastructure/services demand supporting broad sector strength.
Industrial production benefiting from supply chain normalization themes.

weakest.note: Massive tech selloff with 79% of names in bearish structure.
Complete breakdown in discretionary spending on durable goods.
Business services under pressure as corporate spending contracts.

sector_analysis.detail: Clear rotation from growth tech into energy and industrial value. Electronic technology showing mixed signals with hardware outperforming software.

items.text: Triple bear alignment across SPY/QQQ/BTC signals maximum risk-off environment
34% of market in Full Bear with tech services showing 79% bearish participation
Major reversals like NVDA/AAPL need volume confirmation before chasing
Geopolitical tensions with Iran creating additional volatility risk

news_drivers.headline: What Moved Markets
news_drivers.summary: Geopolitical tensions dominated with Trump's Iran deadline creating safe-haven flows into gold while markets recovered from session lows. Corporate earnings mixed with LEVI beating expectations but guidance uncertainty from tariff impacts.

items.text: Iran conflict escalation driving defensive positioning and gold strength
Wall Street recovered from session lows despite looming geopolitical deadline
LEVI earnings beat overshadowed by tariff guidance uncertainty
Energy infrastructure concerns from Hormuz shipping disruption
French diplomatic developments providing some risk-off relief
